description: Build sequence for implementing client-provided data enhancement to Stock Buddy MCP server

sequence.title: Create Client Data Provider
sequence.summary: Implement ClientDataProvider class that extracts data from MCP tool arguments
testableOutcomes: ClientDataProvider successfully extracts OHLCV data from tool arguments
ClientDataProvider successfully extracts fundamentals from tool arguments
Provider returns data in correct format for skills

sequence.title: Implement Data Validation Layer
sequence.summary: Create comprehensive validation for all client-provided data types
testableOutcomes: Invalid data types trigger specific validation errors
Date format errors are caught with helpful messages
Range violations are detected and reported

sequence.title: Enhance Tool Schemas
sequence.summary: Update MCP tool schemas with detailed data requirements and examples
testableOutcomes: Tool schemas include complete field definitions
Example payloads work with actual tools

sequence.title: Update Provider Factory
sequence.summary: Modify provider factory to detect and use client data when available
testableOutcomes: Factory correctly selects ClientDataProvider when data provided
Factory falls back to configured provider when no client data

sequence.title: Implement Security Controls
sequence.summary: Add security measures for client-provided data

sequence.title: Optimize Performance
sequence.summary: Ensure system handles large datasets efficiently
testableOutcomes: 5 years of daily data processes without timeout
Response time under 5 seconds for full analysis

sequence.title: Create Python Client Examples
sequence.summary: Develop Python examples showing data fetching and tool usage
testableOutcomes: Python example fetches data from Yahoo Finance

sequence.title: Create JavaScript Client Examples
sequence.summary: Develop JavaScript/TypeScript examples for web integration
testableOutcomes: JavaScript example uses fetch API correctly
TypeScript types are accurate and complete

sequence.title: Enhance Error Handling
sequence.summary: Implement detailed error messages with remediation guidance

sequence.title: Create Migration Guide
sequence.summary: Document migration process from server to client data

sequence.title: Integration Testing
sequence.summary: Comprehensive testing of client data flow end-to-end
testableOutcomes: All tools work with client-provided data
